entities.boy: a boy in a camping vest
entities.raccoon: a raccoon with a striped tail

scenes.title: The Campsite
scenes.background_prompt: A forest campsite at night with a crackling campfire surrounded by stones, a blue tent with the flap open, a starry sky with visible constellations, and tall pine trees silhouetted against the sky. No people, no animals.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A forest campsite at night under a starry sky. A boy of about nine wearing a brown camping vest over a flannel shirt sits on a log next to a crackling campfire surrounded by a ring of stones. He holds a long stick with a white marshmallow toasting over the orange flames, looking at it with a content smile. His back is turned to the right side of the scene. Behind him, a raccoon with dark mask-like markings and a bushy striped tail creeps low to the ground, sneaking toward an open green backpack that leans against a tree trunk. The backpack's main compartment is unzipped, revealing snack wrappers and a water bottle inside. A blue tent with its flap partly open stands to the left. Tall dark pine trees frame the scene, and the sky above is deep navy blue filled with bright white stars and a crescent moon.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place boy on the log next to the campfire, sitting and holding a stick with a marshmallow over the flames, smiling contentedly, back turned to the right. Place raccoon behind him (right), creeping low to the ground toward the open green backpack leaning against a tree.
scenes.scene_description: In the bottom left foreground, a patch of green grass is dotted with small white and yellow flowers, four-leaf clovers, and scattered brown leaves. A large brown pine tree trunk frames the far left edge of the scene. Moving right, a circular campfire pit made of several grey stones contains burning brown logs with vibrant orange and yellow flames. To the right of the fire, a boy with short brown hair sits on a horizontal brown log. He wears a green long-sleeved shirt, a brown utility vest with a small silver compass-like detail, brown pants, and brown boots. He holds a long wooden stick with a white marshmallow on the end over the flames. Behind the boy's log sits a small pile of stacked firewood. To the right of the boy, a raccoon with grey and brown fur, a black eye mask, and a ringed tail walks toward the right edge of the frame. In the bottom right corner, a green backpack with yellow straps and several pockets sits upright on the grass near more small flowers and a cluster of long, pointed green leaves. Behind the boy and the raccoon stands a blue dome-shaped tent with its flap open, revealing a rolled-up yellow sleeping bag inside. The midground is filled with a dense forest of dark blue and green pine trees of various heights. A second large brown pine tree trunk frames the far right edge. The background features a deep blue night sky filled with numerous white stars and several fluffy, light blue-tinted clouds. Three constellations are visible, connected by thin white lines: one resembling the Big Dipper in the upper left, another in the center left, and Orion in the upper right.

S: deep blue night sky with stars
dense forest of dark pine trees
blue dome-shaped tent in a clearing
IR: the boy feels calm and happy
P: the boy wants to roast marshmallows
the raccoon hopes to find food
A: boy holding a stick over fire

ENP: small silver compass on the vest
SC: while the boy roasts a marshmallow
because it is a clear night
CC: the fire is hot but small
M: the boy thinks about his snack
the raccoon wonders about the bag
L: the boy whispers to the raccoon
the boy hums a quiet song
